title: gynoxys laurata
intro: Gynoxys laurata, also known as Laurate Gynoxys or Goldenthread, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gynoxys laurata include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and colic, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Gynoxys laurata is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, and it is also used in some herbal remedies to treat a range of health conditions.
